form.formComment: Last start 4th over 2875m at Enghien, beaten 14m by Matador in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 6 at $8.40. Before that, a good run when 3rd over 2100m at this track, beaten 4.2m by Marchand De Reve in 4yo colts and gelding race on February 11 at $3.10. Capable of testing this line-up.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a game effort when 3rd over 2300m at Marseille-Borely beaten 57m by Mozart Sautonne in 4yo race on March 25 at $21. Nicely placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Maximiliano De Lou at Caen over 2450m in a 4yo colts and gelding race on March 9 at $9.90. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Magister D'ela at Caen over 2450m in a 4yo colts and gelding handicap on March 25 at $5.40. Big run expected.

form.formComment: Resumed when beaten 6.8m fourth behind Myley Elde at Meslay-du-Maine over 2875m in a 4yo race on March 17. Confident of improvement on the first-up effort.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resumed when beaten 6.8m fourth behind Myley Elde at Meslay-du-Maine over 2875m in a 4yo race on March 17. Confident of improvement on the first-up effort.

form.formComment: Four-year-old gelding is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Laval and Mauquenchy both over 2850m. Last start posted a big 10m win as favourite at Laval beating Many Dreams in 4yo race on March 11 at $1.60. In terrific form and is the one to beat again.

form.formComment: Having his second run back from a spell. Good run when 2nd over 2875m at Enghien beaten 10m by My Dream Du Grais in 4yo colts and gelding race on March 17 at $31. Can go one better.

form.formComment: Resumes today. His previous first-up run was successful when he won by 7.7m as favourite at Vichy beating Maestro Music in 3yo colts and gelding race on May 26 at $2.90. Prefer him later in the campaign.

form.formComment: Recent efforts have been modest. Last start disqualified at Meslay-du-Maine on March 17 over 2875m. The run before disqualified at Enghien on March 6 over 2875m. Nicely placed to return to form.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after only four days break. Lacklustre first-up performance when disqualified at Cherbourg on April 6 over 2625m. Needs to find extra to beat these.
